title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing the core CLI and server to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, offering a simple API to chat with and embed local models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama with both Node and browser support.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a local LLM backend for chains and agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI) supporting chat, RAG, multimodal and admin features.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java SDK for Ollama, wrapping the REST API with fluent builders and POJOs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting and chat history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot proxy that routes code-completion requests to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistent volume support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images and compose examples for running Ollama in containers.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-vector
summary: Lightweight vector database plugin for Ollama that stores embeddings locally and performs similarity search.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repository tracking community SDKs for C#, Go, PHP, Rust and other languages.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node that integrates Ollama into automation workflows for local LLM tasks.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that adds AI assistant blocks powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin enabling local AI text generation inside notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-slackbot
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams chat with local Ollama models directly in channels or DMs.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama for both embeddings and chat with a Streamlit UI.
